hero.backgroundPicture: A picture showing Ny Hasina in a vast field of green grass with a beautiful blue sky and few clouds.
hero.paragraph: A creative mind building every day — crafting performant systems, immersive experiences, and thoughtful digital worlds through code, design, and experimentation.

header.title: Skills
header.subtitle: Technologies, tools, and creative disciplines I have strong experience working with.

webDev.title: Web Development
webDev.subtitle: Front-end developer specialized in crafting premium, responsive web experiences with React. Passionate about modern UI design, smooth interactions, and building visually distinctive interfaces with custom-made assets and icons.

gameDev.title: Game Development
gameDev.subtitle: Developing games has been a long-time passion of mine, and over the years I’ve built experience across every part of the process — gameplay programming, UI, tools, workflows, and asset creation. I enjoy crafting performant systems and creating efficient pipelines that accelerate development while maintaining a polished final experience.

lowLevelDev.title: Low-Level Programming
lowLevelDev.subtitle: Low-level programmer specialized in C/C++, with strong foundations in memory management, optimization, and systems architecture. Experienced in rebuilding core Unix library components and developing performant software close to the hardware.

photoEditing.title: Photo Editing
photoEditing.subtitle: Comfortable with photo editing and visual asset refinement, with experience creating polished compositions and improving the overall presentation of a project.

3D.title: 3D
3D.subtitle: Passionate about 3D creation, I’ve built strong experience across nearly every part of the workflow using Blender — from modeling and texturing to rigging, animation, and environment creation. This versatility allows me to bring ideas to life while maintaining both creative control and technical consistency throughout production.

art.title: Art
art.subtitle: Because games are a blend of technology and art, I naturally became interested in the creative side of development as well. Even though I’m still continuously improving, I enjoy working on artistic aspects and developing my sense of composition, aesthetics, and visual storytelling.

header.title: Projects
header.subtitle: A selection of projects I have worked on, both completed and in progress.

schoolProjects.title: School Projects
schoolProjects.libft: Recreates basic C library functions and utilities from scratch.
schoolProjects.get_next_line: Implements a function to read a file one line at a time, focusing on buffers and memory management in C.
schoolProjects.ft_printf: Recreates the C printf function, teaching variadic functions, formatting, and type handling.
schoolProjects.philosopher: A multithreading simulation of the dining philosophers problem, focused on concurrency and synchronization.
schoolProjects.minishell: A simple Unix shell handling commands, pipes, redirections, and processes.
schoolProjects.webserv: A basic HTTP server built from scratch, covering sockets, HTTP, and server logic in C++.
schoolProjects.ft_transcendence: A full-stack project developing a real-time interactive real estate platform with an AI-powered search system, including end-to-end implementation of the user interface as well as backend and frontend functionality.
schoolProjects.ft_linear_regression: A small introduction to machine learning concepts through the implementation of a basic linear regression model and data visualization tools.
